title: randsum Dice Mechanic Spec
description: Declarative format for expressing a complete game system's dice mechanics as a four-stage pipeline: Dice → Modify → Resolve → Outcome.

$schema.description: Must be the randsum schema URL to enable validation and VS Code autocomplete

name.description: The name of the game system (e.g. 'Blades in the Dark', 'D&D 5e')

shortcode.description: Short identifier for the game, used as the generated TypeScript filename (e.g. 'blades' for Blades in the Dark)

game_url.description: URL of the game's official page or marketing site

srd_url.description: URL of the game's System Reference Document (SRD), if publicly available

pools.description: Named reusable dice pool definitions. Reference with { "$ref": "#/pools/<name>" }.

tables.description: Named lookup tables mapping roll totals to result strings. Reference with { "$ref": "#/tables/<name>" }.

outcomes.description: Named reusable outcome operations. Reference with { "$ref": "#/outcomes/<name>" }.

^roll[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*$.description: Named roll — the key name becomes the export (e.g. rollFortune → rollFortune). Must start with 'roll' followed by an uppercase letter.

PoolDefinition.description: A dice pool shape. Defines die sides and optionally a default quantity. Quantity can always be overridden in the dice stage.

sides.description: Number of faces on the die (e.g. 6 for a d6, 20 for a d20). Accepts $input for dynamic die types.

quantity.description: Default number of dice to roll. Can be overridden per-roll in the dice stage.

TableDefinition.description: A range-keyed lookup table mapping roll totals to result strings.

ranges.description: Ordered list of range entries. Evaluated top to bottom; first match wins.

TableRange.description: A single condition-to-result entry in a lookup table. Match by resolved value (exact or min/max range), pool composition (poolCondition), or both. When both are present, both must match (AND semantics). Cannot mix exact and min/max.

poolCondition.description: Pool-composition condition. When combined with exact/min/max, both must match (AND semantics). Use for mechanics like Blades criticals (2+ sixes) or Shadowrun glitches (half+ ones).

result.description: The game result string returned when this entry matches

PoolCondition.description: Count dice in the pool matching a condition and check the count against a threshold. Specify exactly one of atLeast (absolute count) or atLeastRatio (proportion of pool).

pool.description: Which pool to evaluate: preModify (all dice as-rolled, before modifiers) or postModify (dice after modifiers). Defaults to preModify.

countWhere.description: Which dice to count. E.g. { operator: '=', value: 6 } counts sixes.

operator.description: Comparison operator applied to each die

value.description: Value to compare each die against

atLeast.description: Minimum absolute count of matching dice required. E.g. 2 means two or more dice must match.

atLeastRatio.description: Minimum proportion of the pool that must match. E.g. 0.5 means half or more of the dice must match (Shadowrun glitch pattern).

RollDefinition.description: A complete roll pipeline. Pipeline order: dice (or dicePools) → modify (optional) → resolve (required) → outcome (optional). Use 'when' to define conditional overrides evaluated before the pipeline runs.

inputs.description: Declared runtime parameters for this roll. Bind values in the pipeline with { "$input": "<name>" }.

dice.description: Stage 1 — define the dice pool(s) to roll. Single pool config or array of named pools for multi-pool rolls. Mutually exclusive with dicePools.

dicePools.description: Named dice pools for multi-pool rolls. Use instead of dice. Each value is a DiceConfig. Mutually exclusive with dice.

modify.description: Stage 2 (optional) — apply modifiers to individual dice before resolving. Each entry applies one modifier.

resolve.description: Stage 3 — collapse the dice pool into a single value. Use 'sum' to total the dice, 'countMatching' to count dice meeting a condition, 'tableLookup' to map the total through a table, or a comparePool operation for multi-pool rolls.

outcome.description: Stage 4 (optional) — map the resolved value to a game result string. Use 'ranges' for range-to-result mappings, 'degreeOfSuccess' for the PF2e tiered pattern, 'tableLookup' for a table, or a $ref to a named outcome.

when.description: Conditional overrides evaluated before the pipeline runs. First matching condition wins. Each entry can override any subset of pipeline stages.

postResolveModifiers.description: Modifiers applied after resolve (to the total, not individual dice). Use for bonuses like 2d6+stat.

conditionalPools.description: Named extra dice pools rolled only when a condition matches. Each pool's total is added or subtracted from the main total. Keys are used as identifiers for $conditionalPool references in details.

details.description: Named fields returned alongside the roll result. Each field is either a pass-through of an input value or a computed expression (diceTotal = sum before postResolveModifiers, total = final total).

ConditionalPool.description: An extra dice pool rolled conditionally. When the condition matches, roll the pool and add or subtract its total.

pool.description: The dice pool to roll when the condition matches.

arithmetic.description: Whether to add or subtract this pool's total from the main total

RollCase.description: A conditional pipeline override. When the condition matches, the override stages replace the corresponding defaults. Unspecified stages fall through to the defaults.

Condition.description: A condition evaluated against a declared input at call time.

input.description: Name of the declared input to test (must match a key in 'inputs')

operator.description: Comparison operator. Use '=' for equality; '>', '>=', '<', '<=' for numeric comparisons.

value.description: Literal value to compare against (must match the input's declared type)

PipelineOverride.description: Partial pipeline override. Specify only the stages to replace; omitted stages fall through to the roll definition's defaults. At least one stage must be overridden.

postResolveModifiers.description: Override for post-resolve modifiers (applied to the total, not individual dice)

InputDeclaration.description: Declaration of a runtime input parameter accepted by this roll.

type.description: Data type of this input parameter

default.description: Default value used when the input is not provided

enum.description: Exhaustive list of allowed values for this input

optional.description: When true, this input can be omitted even without a default value. The generated function parameter will be optional.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this input represents

DiceConfig.description: A single dice pool configuration in the dice stage. References a named pool or defines one inline.

pool.description: The dice pool to roll — reference a named pool with $ref or define one inline.

quantity.description: Number of dice to roll. Overrides the pool's default quantity.

key.description: Name for this pool's results in a multi-pool roll (e.g. 'hope', 'fear'). Required when dice is an array.

PostResolveModifyOperation.description: A single modifier applied to the resolved total (not individual dice). Use for bonuses like 2d6+stat.

add.description: Add a flat value to the resolved total

ModifyOperation.description: A single modifier applied to individual dice values before resolving. Include exactly one modifier key per entry.

add.description: Add a flat value to each individual die result (not the total — use addToTotal for post-resolve addition)

cap.description: Clamp each die result to a min/max range

min.description: Minimum value to clamp die results to

max.description: Maximum value to clamp die results to

markDice.description: Attach a label to each die that satisfies a comparison. Use with keepMarked to filter.

value.description: Value to compare each die against

flag.description: Label to attach to dice that satisfy the comparison (e.g. 'hit', 'success')

keepMarked.description: Keep only dice that were marked with this label by a preceding markDice operation

keepHighest.description: Keep only the N highest dice, discarding the rest (e.g. advantage: keepHighest 1 of 2d20)

keepLowest.description: Keep only the N lowest dice, discarding the rest (e.g. disadvantage: keepLowest 1 of 2d20)

ComparePoolOperation.description: Compare two named dice pools and map the winner to an outcome string.

pools.description: Exactly two pool names to compare (must match keys in dicePools)

ties.description: Result string when both pools roll the same total. If omitted, ties are undefined behavior.

outcomes.description: Map from pool name to result string for the winning pool.

ResolveOperation.description: Stage 3 — collapse the dice pool into a single value. Choose one: 'sum' to total the dice, 'countMatching' to count dice meeting a condition, 'tableLookup' to map the sum through a table, or a comparePool operation for multi-pool rolls.

oneOf.description: Sum all remaining dice values into a single total

countMatching.description: Count the number of dice satisfying a condition (e.g. count dice >= 4 for PbtA hits)

value.description: Value to compare each die against

RemoteTableLookupOperation.description: Resolve the roll by looking up a result in a remote JSON dataset fetched at codegen time. The fetched data is embedded as a static constant in the generated TypeScript file.

url.description: URL to fetch JSON data from at codegen time (e.g. 'https://example.com/tables.json')

dataPath.description: Optional dot-path to extract an array from the response (e.g. 'data.tables'). Omit if the root response IS the array.

field.description: Field on each array entry to match against (e.g. 'name')

input.description: Name of the input parameter whose value to match (e.g. 'tableName')

errorMessage.description: Template error message when find returns no match. Use ${value} as placeholder for the input value.

tableField.description: Field on the found entry containing the range-keyed table (e.g. 'table')

resultMapping.description: Compose a typed result object from the lookup result, found entry, inputs, and roll total

ResultMappingLeaf.description: A single field in a resultMapping — sources a value from the lookup result, found table, input, or roll total

$lookupResult.description: Dot-path into the resolver function's return value (e.g. 'result.label')

fallback.description: Fallback value when the primary $lookupResult path is undefined

$foundTable.description: Field on the found table object (e.g. 'table')

$input.description: Pass-through value from a roll input (e.g. 'tableName')

expr.description: A computed expression — currently only 'total' (the roll total)

OutcomeOperation.description: Stage 4 — map the resolved value to a game result string. Choose one: 'ranges' for range-to-result mapping, 'degreeOfSuccess' for PF2e-style tiered outcomes, or 'tableLookup' for a named table.

ranges.description: Ordered list of range-to-result mappings. Evaluated top to bottom; first match wins.

degreeOfSuccess.description: PF2e-style tiered outcome. Each value is the minimum total required to achieve that degree. At least one degree must be specified.

criticalSuccess.description: Minimum total for a critical success

criticalFailure.description: Minimum total for a critical failure

OutcomeOperationOrRef.description: An outcome operation or a $ref to a named entry in the 'outcomes' section.

Ref.description: A JSON Pointer reference to a named definition within this spec file (e.g. { "$ref": "#/pools/actionDice" }).

$ref.description: JSON Pointer path into this spec file. Examples: "#/pools/actionDice", "#/tables/coreMechanic"

RefOrTableDefinition.description: A reference to a named table or an inline table definition.

DetailsLeafDef.description: A leaf field in the details object. Either passes through an input value, computes a pipeline expression, or references a pool total.

$input.description: Name of the declared input parameter to pass through

default.description: Default value if the input is not provided

expr.description: Computed expression: 'diceTotal' = sum before postResolveModifiers, 'total' = final total

$pool.description: Name of the dice pool whose total to include

field.description: Which value from the pool result (currently only 'total')

$conditionalPool.description: Name of the conditional pool whose total to include (must match a key in conditionalPools)

field.description: Which value from the conditional pool result (currently only 'total')

DetailsFieldDef.description: A details field: a leaf value, a nested object of leaves, or a conditional object (present only when an input is provided).

oneOf.description: Conditional details object: present when the input exists, undefined otherwise

input.description: Name of the input to check for presence

value.description: Nested object of leaf fields, emitted when the condition matches

IntegerOrInput.description: A literal integer, a runtime input binding ({ "$input": "paramName" }), or a conditional boolean binding ({ "$input": "flag", "ifTrue": N, "ifFalse": M }).

$input.description: Name of the declared input parameter whose value will be used here
Name of the boolean input whose value determines which integer to use

ifTrue.description: Value to use when the input is truthy

ifFalse.description: Value to use when the input is falsy
